description: You are a Senior Account Manager at a B2B SaaS company. Log in to Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) to resolve a critical enterprise account crisis identified in the team channels. Identify the affected account and the scope of the problem, then coordinate a cross-functional response involving sales, customer success, product, and executive leadership. Draft a retention plan and ensure executive-level outreach is completed within the business day. This account represents significant ARR; act with the urgency appropriate to the potential impact on quarterly targets.
